subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I commune with Thee, for Thou art He that answereth the prayer of the supplicant; and I beseech Thee by the manifestations of Thy oneness and by Thy signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی اناجیک و انت المناجی للناجی و اتوسل الیک بتجلیات احدیتک و ایات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @intelligible vs. perceptible realities, @soul; spirit after death, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
